zh.lifeSummary: 當James Merritt Jr.於1627年8月26日出生在英國米德萊可斯特普尼時，他的父親James Merrit28歲，母親Ann Burgis28歲。他於1644年12月4日與Mary Nelson在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯特普尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1669年6月4日在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Merritt Jr.于1627年8月26日出生在英国米德萊可斯特普尼时，他的父亲James Merrit28岁，母亲Ann Burgis28岁。他于1644年12月4日与Mary Nelson在英国英格兰米德萊可斯特普尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1669年6月4日在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Merritt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Merriott , Marriott , or Marritt. The last of these is most often a variant of Merriott or Marriott , but possibly in some instances from Middle English Marret or Merret, a syncopated form of Margaret, Mergeret.

variants.name: Merritts
meanings: English: variant of or patronymic from   Merritt   2.

variants.name: Merriott
meanings: habitational name from Merriott in Somerset. The placename may derive from Old English mere, miere ‘mare’, mere ‘pool’, or (ge)mǣre ‘boundary’ + geat ‘gate, gap’.

from the Middle English male personal name Meryet (Old English Mǣrgēat, from mǣre ‘famous’ + Gēat, a tribal name). In post-medieval times, both this surname and the placename in 1 above underwent changes in pronunciation, sometimes by confusion with Marriott , and often by losing the medial -i- or -y-, hence Merritt , Meritt , and so on.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When James Merritt Jr. was born on 26 August 1627, in Stepney, Middlesex, England, his father, James Merrit, was 28 and his mother, Ann Burgis, was 28. He married Mary Nelson on 4 December 1644, in Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 June 1669, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Merritt Jr. est né le 26 août 1627, à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, James Merrit, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ann Burgis, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Nelson le 4 décembre 1644, à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1669, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Merritt Jr. am 26. August 1627 in Stepney, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Merrit 28 und seine Mutter Ann Burgis 28. Er hat am 4. Dezember 1644 in Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Mary Nelson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1669 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Merritt Jr. è nato il il 26 agosto 1627 nel Stepney, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, James Merrit, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Ann Burgis, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Nelson il 4 dicembre 1644, nel Stepney, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1669, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: James Merritt Jr.(이)가 1627년 8월 26일 영국 미들레세스 스테p니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Merrit(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Burgis(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1644년 12월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테p니에서 Mary Nelson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1669년 6월 4일 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Merritt Jr. nasceu em 26 de agosto de 1627, em Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Merrit, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ann Burgis, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Nelson em 4 de dezembro de 1644, em Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1669, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Merritt Jr. родился 26 августа 1627 г. в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени James Merrit было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Burgis, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Nelson 4 декабря 1644 г. в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 июня 1669 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.
